title: clinopodium clivorum
intro: Clinopodium clivorum, also known as the mountain savory, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and Asia. It is a member of the mint family and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is known for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe wounds. Clinopodium clivorum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
